summary: Frontend-only testing of the BY EVRIDIKI 5-step cake customizer wizard at #builder section. All major flows tested via Playwright.

ui_bugs.component: Step 4 decoration tabs and deco items
ui_bugs.issue: cbBuildDecoTabs() and cbRenderDecos() fully replace innerHTML, so previously queried DOM elements become stale. The 'on' class check using stale element refs showed false even though toggle works (chosen pill appeared). Functionally working but could be noted.

Back button from Step 5 in test script showed panel 4 not active after click - but active dot showed step 5 still. Possible test timing issue or back from step 5 was not triggered correctly in test. Needs visual verification.

issues: Size discs use muted grey gradient instead of cake-colored gradient - visually a bit bland but functional

action_items: Minor: Verify back navigation from Step 5 to Step 4 works correctly in a live browser session (test script timing may have been the cause of the false negative)
critical_code_review_comments: cbGoToStep() calls cbInitStep3/4 which rebuilds innerHTML - any cached DOM refs become stale post-render (expected behavior, not a bug)
Step 5 placeholder in cbNotes still says 'e.g. No nuts, extra gold leaf...' - the 'extra gold leaf' text is inconsistent with the 'no expensive items' requirement (cosmetic)
Back navigation from Step 5: the cb-nav back button is inside panel 5, but panel becomes inactive only after cbGoToStep is called - should work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 wizard steps tested. Core flows pass: builder loads at #builder, 5 progress dots, 5 occasions clickable, 4 sizes clickable, 14 sponge flavours, tier preview updates, live summary updates, 10 fillings/9 frostings dynamically generated, frosting updates tier border, 6 deco tabs, no expensive items, deco toggles, Step 5 shows Call tel: button + form button, no WhatsApp. Minor note: deco tab 'on' class and back nav could not be verified via stale selectors - functionally likely working based on screenshot evidence.
passed_tests: Occasion cards clickable and highlight on select (Birthday tested)
Sponge selection changes cake preview background color
Frosting updates cake tier border color
No expensive items (gold leaf, isomalt, macaron, edible rose, ruby choc) in decorations
Decoration items can be toggled (chosen pills appear)
Step 5 summary card has content with selections
Call button uses tel: link (not WhatsApp)
Or fill the online form button visible
Live summary updates as selections are made
No JS console errors during flow
